_schema: JUDGEMENT overlay. Facts live in seletar_green_walk_14_dd_raw.json, produced by `python -m researcher.landed.dd` and never hand-edited. Nothing in this file may restate a raw fact — it interprets them. If a raw number is wrong, fix the tool and re-run.
archetype_zh: 近年新建、交钥匙型（开发商楼盘，<10 年）
archetype_note: Developer-built terrace (Luxus Hills, Bukit Sembawang / Singapore United Estates), completed ~2019-2020. Buildability and rebuild economics are MOOT for this archetype and are deliberately not modelled — nobody tears down a 6-year-old house. The DD weight sits on defects, the estate's surroundings, and the price cohort. The 3-STOREY ENVELOPE matters here as a NEIGHBOUR risk, not as upside.
archetype_note_zh: 开发商建造的排屋（Luxus Hills，Bukit Sembawang / Singapore United Estates），约 2019–2020 年完工。此类资产的可建性与重建经济学不适用，本报告刻意不做该模型 —— 没人会拆掉一栋六年新房。DD 重心在缺陷、周边环境与价格队列。此处的「三层包络」是邻居风险，不是自身上行空间。

verdict.call: PROCEED to DD-2 + site visit. Priced against its own cohort, not cheap; the case rests on the school ring holding and on tolerating the industrial edge.
verdict.call_zh: 建议进入 DD-2 与实地看房。按同尺寸队列衡量并不便宜；论点成立与否取决于学区能否维持、以及能否容忍工业边界。
verdict.detail: Nothing at DD-1 kills this address. The plot is a 1,614 sqft intermediate terrace — the estate's dominant size — and it sits in the SMALL-plot cohort, which on this street trades at a land-psf PREMIUM (median $2,663 vs $2,186 for 1,800-2,500 sqft plots). That is a size effect, not a quality signal: you pay more per sqft for less land. The 2026 prints in that cohort run $4.51m-$5.22m and the street's median land psf has risen ~43% since 2021, so this is a re-rated micro-market, not a bargain. Two surroundings items are material but priced, not fatal: a 5.8 ha BUSINESS 2 parcel 151 m due south — the transect shows ~100 m of zoned park then a road in between, a high-inertia buffer but not a permanent one — and an undecided 3,235 sqm RESERVE SITE 209 m ESE that no amount of work can close. The school ring is the thesis (Rosyth ~0.80 km on a conservative proxy) and it is NOT permanent: MOE recomputes home-school distance annually and tells parents to re-verify in the registration year. Binding constraints: the approved plans are seller-gated, and the legal land area is still a $16 title search away.
verdict.detail_zh: DD-1 层面无致命项。地块为 1,614 sqft 的中间排屋 —— 全区最主流尺寸 —— 且落在小地块队列，而本街小地块的土地单价反而更高（中位 $2,663，对比 1,800–2,500 sqft 的 $2,186）。这是面积效应而非品质信号：地更少、单价更贵。该队列 2026 年成交在 $4.51m–$5.22m，本街中位土地单价自 2021 年已上涨约 43% —— 这是一个已经重估过的微观市场，不是捡漏。两项周边因素重大但可定价、非致命：正南 151m 的 5.8 公顷 BUSINESS 2 地块（剖面显示中间隔着约 100m 法定公园与一条路，属高惯性缓冲但非永久），以及东南偏东 209m、3,235 ㎡ 用途未定的 RESERVE SITE（任何工作都无法关闭）。学区是核心论点（Rosyth 约 0.80km，系保守代理值），且不是永久的：MOE 每年重算家校距离，并要求家长在报名当年重新核实。硬约束：批准图纸受卖方授权限制；法定土地面积仍需一次 S$16 的产权检索。

highlights: Plot 1,614 sqft, cross-validated by two independent official sources. The MP2025 zoning parcel reads 150.0 sqm; URA's caveats for this street report land areas of exactly 1,615 sqft on 42 of 63 prints. Two sources that do not talk to each other agreeing is why this is usable without paying for a title — though the LEGAL area still is (INLIS, S$16). 地块 1,614 sqft，经两个互相独立的官方来源交叉验证：MP2025 分区宗地读数 150.0 ㎡，而本街 63 笔 URA caveat 中有 42 笔的土地面积恰为 1,615 sqft。互不相通的来源彼此印证，才使它在不付费的前提下可用 —— 但法定面积仍需 INLIS（S$16）。

Tenure is 999 years from 1879 — NOT freehold — and this is now officially confirmed. All 63 URA caveats on the street say so, unanimously. Portals routinely round this to 'freehold'; the caveats are the free way to catch that before you offer. Expiry ~2878. 地契为999 年自 1879 年起，不是永久地契，且已获官方确认 —— 本街 63 笔 URA caveat 全部一致。门户常把它简化为「freehold」；caveat 是出价前免费识破的途径。到期约 2878 年。

The subject sits in the premium-psf cohort, and that is a size effect, not quality. On this street small plots (<1,800 sqft) run a median land psf of $2,663 against $2,186 for 1,800-2,500 sqft plots — same street, same tenure, same window. A street 'average psf' mixes these and describes no actual house. This is also why portal psf figures for Luxus Hills look self-contradictory. 标的落在高单价队列，这是面积效应而非品质。本街小地块（<1,800 sqft）土地单价中位 $2,663，而 1,800–2,500 sqft 为 $2,186 —— 同街、同地契、同窗口。街道「平均 psf」把两者混在一起，描述的不是任何一栋真实房子；这也正是门户上 Luxus Hills 的 psf 数字自相矛盾的原因。

Re-rated, not cheap: median land psf +43% since 2021. $2,075 (2021) → $2,960 (2026 YTD), with the 1,615 sqft cohort's 2026 prints at $4.51m–$5.22m. Read n on every year — a landed street is thin, and caveat lag under-reports recent months. 已重估，并不便宜：中位土地单价自 2021 年上涨约 43%（$2,075 → $2,960，2026 年至今），1,615 sqft 队列 2026 年成交 $4.51m–$5.22m。每年都要看 n —— landed 街道样本很薄，且 caveat 滞后会低报近月。

Business 2 (heavy-industrial) land 151 m due south — but behind ~100 m of zoned park. The transect is the finding: house → park (20-100 m) → road → Business 2 (from 160 m). The park is a durable buffer, not a permanent one — converting it needs a Master Plan amendment, and URA does gazette those. At GPR 2.5 that land can still carry real bulk. 正南 151m 是 BUSINESS 2 重工业用地 —— 但中间隔着约 100m 的法定公园。剖面才是结论：房屋 → 公园(20–100m) → 道路 → Business 2(自 160m 起)。公园是稳固缓冲但非永久（改变需 Master Plan 修订，而 URA 确实会宪报修订）。GPR 2.5 之下那块地仍可承载可观体量。

A 66 m 'UTILITY' parcel is a cable box, not a substation — its area says so (14.5 sqm). Rating a zone label by distance alone would have written this up as a risk. Area and transect are what stop that. 66m 外的「UTILITY」是配电箱不是变电站 —— 面积（14.5 ㎡）说明了一切。仅凭标签与距离评级，就会把它写成风险。面积与剖面正是防止这一点的手段。

The 1 km school ring is the thesis — and it is not a permanent attribute. Rosyth ~0.80 km and Hougang Pri ~0.80 km on our conservative proxy (MOE measures to the school LAND BOUNDARY, which is nearer, so 'inside' is safe with 200 m of headroom). But SLA recomputes home-school distance ANNUALLY off building plans, supplies it 'as is' as a guide, and tells parents to verify in their child's registration year. A 2026 category does not bind a 2029 registration. 1km 学区是核心论点 —— 且它不是地址的永久属性。按保守代理法，Rosyth 约 0.80km、Hougang 小学约 0.80km（MOE 量到学校地界，只会更近，故「在内」有 200m 余量，安全）。但 SLA 每年依建筑图则重算家校距离，以「as is」提供、称其为 guide，并要求家长在报名当年核实。2026 年的分类不约束 2029 年的报名。

Car-dependent, structurally. Nearest MRT 2.15 km (Buangkok); Hougang 2.29 km, Ang Mo Kio 2.95 km. No station is walkable. Offsetting: no expressway within 4.8 km, so no expressway noise, and Luxus Hills Park is 11 m away. 结构性依赖开车。最近地铁 Buangkok 2.15km，Hougang 2.29km，Ang Mo Kio 2.95km，无步行可达站点。对冲因素：4.8km 内无快速路（故无快速路噪音），且 Luxus Hills 公园就在 11m 外。

'Not on PUB's flood list' is worth almost nothing — and now we can size exactly how little. The designation covers 23.3 ha of Singapore's ~73,000 ha (0.032%) across 36 named locations. Nearly every address is off it, including ones that pond. Whether THIS plot ponds is a site question. 「不在 PUB 易涝清单上」几乎没有价值 —— 现在我们能精确量化「几乎」有多少。该认定覆盖全国约 73,000 公顷中的 23.3 公顷（0.032%），共 36 个命名地点。几乎所有地址都不在其上，包括那些确实积水的。这块地是否积水是实地问题。

dd3_alerts.item_zh: BCA 批准的建筑与结构图纸
dd3_alerts.why: You CANNOT buy these. BCA's Plan Purchase admits only the registered proprietor, their corporation's staff, an MCST chairman, or an authorised person holding the owner's SIGNED AUTHORISATION plus the owner's property tax statement. Without them there is no way to compare as-built against as-approved — the only method for detecting unauthorised works, which become YOUR liability after completion.
dd3_alerts.why_zh: 买家自己买不到。BCA 图纸购买仅限：登记业主、业主公司职员、MCST 主席，或持有业主签署授权书及业主房产税单的受权代理人。没有图纸就无法比对「实建 vs 批准」—— 而这是发现违建的唯一方法，且违建责任在成交后由买家承担。
dd3_alerts.who: Seller must furnish or authorise; then an architect/PE compares against the site
dd3_alerts.who_zh: 须由卖方提供或授权；再由建筑师/结构工程师现场比对
dd3_alerts.when: OTP CONDITION — or obtain before offering
dd3_alerts.when_zh: 写入 OTP 条件 —— 或在出价前取得
dd3_alerts.note: A seller who will not authorise is itself the finding. Mitigating for THIS house: developer-built ~2019-2020, so the original plans should be clean. The live question is any A&A by the current owner since handover.
dd3_alerts.note_zh: 卖方拒绝授权本身就是结论。本案缓和因素：2019–2020 年开发商建造，原始图纸理应干净。真正要查的是现业主自交房以来的加建改建。

dd3_alerts.item: Business 2 land 151 m south — what is on it TODAY, and how it operates
dd3_alerts.item_zh: 正南 151m 的 Business 2 地块 —— 今天上面是什么、如何运作
dd3_alerts.why: Zoning says what MAY be built (GPR 2.5, heavy-industrial category); it does not say what is there now, its operating hours, lorry routes, or noise. The named industrial buildings OneMap knows (RFC, TEPL on Serangoon North Ave 5) are 850 m+ away, which hints the 151 m parcel may be low-intensity today — making it a FUTURE risk at GPR 2.5 rather than a present nuisance. Neither reading is settleable from a map, and the ~100 m park buffer changes the severity but not the question.
dd3_alerts.why_zh: 分区只说明「可以建什么」（GPR 2.5，重工业类别），不说明今天那里有什么、作业时间、货车路线与噪音。OneMap 已知的工业楼（Serangoon North Ave 5 的 RFC、TEPL）都在 850m 以外，暗示这块 151m 的地目前强度可能较低 —— 那它就是 GPR 2.5 下的「未来风险」而非当下滋扰。两种可能都无法靠地图定论；约 100m 的公园缓冲改变了严重度，但没有改变问题本身。
dd3_alerts.who: You, on site — weekday working hours AND after 9pm
dd3_alerts.who_zh: 本人实地 —— 工作日上班时段与晚 9 点后各一次

dd3_alerts.item: Rosyth 1 km status — pull the official SchoolQuery category, and re-verify at registration
dd3_alerts.item_zh: Rosyth 1km 资格 —— 取官方 SchoolQuery 分类，并在报名当年重新核实
dd3_alerts.why: Our 0.80 km is a PROXY (haversine to the school's point). The operative artifact is OneMap SchoolQuery's category for postal 805248 — free, 2 minutes, but its UI would not drive here and the API is token-gated, so it is unretrieved. Two things in SLA's own disclaimer change the risk: HSD is recomputed ANNUALLY (June 2026 vintage) off building plans and 'distances can change yearly'; and SLA supplies it 'as is' as a guide, telling parents to verify in their child's registration year. If the school ring is the reason to buy, this is the single item to close first. Mitigant: 200 m of headroom and the proxy over-estimates.
dd3_alerts.why_zh: 我们的 0.80km 是代理值（到学校「点」的 haversine）。真正起作用的是 OneMap SchoolQuery 对邮编 805248 的分类 —— 免费、两分钟，但本次 UI 无法驱动、API 需 token，故未取得。SLA 免责声明中的两点会改变风险：HSD 每年依建筑图则重算（当前 June 2026 版），且「distances can change yearly」；SLA 以「as is」提供、称其为 guide，要求家长在孩子报名当年核实。若学区是购买理由，这是最该先关掉的一项。缓和因素：尚有 200m 余量，且代理方法系高估。
dd3_alerts.who: You — onemap.gov.sg/school, enter 805248, read the Primary School category
dd3_alerts.who_zh: 本人 —— onemap.gov.sg/school 输入 805248，读取小学分类
dd3_alerts.when: PRE-OFFER (and re-verify in the registration year)
dd3_alerts.when_zh: 出价前（并在报名当年重新核实）

dd3_alerts.item: Legal land area, tenure commencement and encumbrances
dd3_alerts.item_zh: 法定土地面积、地契起算日与产权负担
dd3_alerts.why: DOWNGRADED, not closed. The plot area (1,614 sqft) is now cross-validated by two official sources and the tenure (999 yrs from 1879) is unanimous across 63 caveats — so this is no longer a discovery item. But the MP parcel is an indicative ZONING parcel, not a cadastral lot, and no free source shows mortgages, caveats, court orders, restrictive covenants, easements or the Known Encroachment flag. S$16 converts a strong inference into a legal fact and reveals the encumbrances no map can.
dd3_alerts.why_zh: 已降级，但未关闭。地块面积（1,614 sqft）现已由两个官方来源交叉验证，地契（999 年自 1879 年起）在 63 笔 caveat 中一致 —— 故不再是「发现型」事项。但 MP 宗地是指示性分区宗地而非地籍丘块，且没有任何免费来源能显示按揭、caveat、法院命令、限制性契约、地役权或 Known Encroachment 标记。S$16 把强推断变成法律事实，并揭示地图看不到的产权负担。
dd3_alerts.who: You — INLIS Property Title Information (S$16) + Property Ownership Information (S$5.25). Search by LOT: SLA disclaims the address-to-lot correlation.
dd3_alerts.who_zh: 本人 —— INLIS 产权资料（S$16）+ 业权资料（S$5.25）。按地段号检索：SLA 声明不对「地址↔地段」对应关系负责。

dd3_alerts.item: Reserve Site 209 m ESE — future use undecided
dd3_alerts.item_zh: 东南偏东 209m 的 Reserve Site —— 用途未定
dd3_alerts.why: 'Reserve Site' means URA has not committed a use. No source can tell you what it becomes. At 3,235 sqm it is small, which bounds the downside, and our transect toward it never lands inside the parcel — the ray is aimed at the nearest edge point, which sits on a road boundary, so the walk describes the gap (park, then waterbody) without confirming arrival. It cannot be closed by any amount of desk or professional work.
dd3_alerts.why_zh: 「Reserve Site」意味着 URA 尚未确定用途，没有任何来源能告诉你它会变成什么。3,235 ㎡ 面积较小，下行有界；且我们朝它的剖面射线并未落入该地块 —— 射线瞄准的是最近边缘点，而该点位于道路边界上，故剖面描述了中间隔着什么（公园、再水体），但不能确认「到达」。无论桌面还是专业工作都无法关闭此项。
dd3_alerts.who: Nobody — monitor URA's MP2025 amendments register
dd3_alerts.who_zh: 无人可定 —— 持续关注 URA 的 MP2025 修订登记册

dd3_alerts.item: Defects and build quality (the turnkey archetype's main risk)
dd3_alerts.item_zh: 缺陷与施工质量（交钥匙型资产的主要风险）
dd3_alerts.why: ~6-7 years old: the developer's Defects Liability Period is long expired and this is a resale under caveat emptor. Waterproofing, roof, sanitary line, and any owner A&A are the live questions. Rebuild economics are NOT the question for this archetype and are deliberately not modelled.
dd3_alerts.why_zh: 房龄约 6–7 年：开发商缺陷责任期早已届满，且属二手买卖，适用 caveat emptor（买者自负）。真正的问题是防水、屋面、排污管线，以及业主自行加建改建。重建经济学对此类资产不适用，本报告刻意不做该模型。
dd3_alerts.who: Building inspector; CCTV the sanitary line
dd3_alerts.who_zh: 验房师；排污管线 CCTV 内窥
dd3_alerts.when_zh: 期权期内（可在 14 天内完成）

dd3_alerts.why: The PUB list cannot answer this: 36 national entries covering 23.3 ha of ~73,000 ha. There is no free geospatial flood layer — the data.gov.sg 'Flood Prone Areas' dataset is a national hectares time-series, not polygons. A 2.0 ha waterbody sits 175 m ESE. Plot-vs-road level and where water actually goes are visible only on site.
dd3_alerts.why_zh: PUB 清单回答不了：全国 36 条、覆盖约 73,000 公顷中的 23.3 公顷。不存在免费的地块级洪水图层 —— data.gov.sg 的「Flood Prone Areas」数据集是全国公顷数时间序列，不是多边形。东南偏东 175m 有 2.0 公顷水体。地块与路面高差、雨水实际流向，只有实地才看得到。
dd3_alerts.who: You, on site during/after heavy rain; ask neighbours
dd3_alerts.who_zh: 本人在大雨中/雨后实地；询问邻居
dd3_alerts.when_zh: 尽量出价前；否则期权期内

dd3_alerts.item_zh: 公允价值 —— 刻意不给出
dd3_alerts.why: This report gives observed transactions and their spread, not a valuation. A caveat price bundles land AND building; it is not decomposable into a land value by dividing by land area, so the cohort's $2,663/psf median is a market observation, not this house's worth. Condition, orientation, corner-vs-intermediate and the exact fit-out are unpriced here. The landed AVM is a separate in-flight track (research/registry/01_roadmap.md, L0-L4).
dd3_alerts.why_zh: 本报告给出的是观察到的成交及其分布，不是估值。caveat 价格是「土地＋建筑」的捆绑价，不能用土地面积去除得出土地价值 —— 故队列 $2,663/psf 的中位数是市场观察，不是这栋房子的价值。房况、朝向、边间与中间、具体装修在此均未定价。landed 估值引擎是另一条在建赛道（research/registry/01_roadmap.md，L0–L4）。
dd3_alerts.who: The L-track engine, or a bank/valuer indication before offering
dd3_alerts.who_zh: L 赛道引擎，或出价前向银行/估价师取指示价

tax_clock.note: SSD changed on 4 Jul 2025: residential bought on/after that date has a 4-YEAR holding period (was 3) with rates 4pp higher at each tier (4%-16%). No transition period. The clock runs off the OTP-exercise date. On any hold under 4 years this dominates the cost stack — on a ~$4.8m purchase the first-year 16% band is ~$768k, far larger than every other line in this report combined.
tax_clock.note_zh: SSD 于 2025-07-04 变更：该日及之后购入的住宅，持有期为 4 年（原 3 年），各档税率各上调 4 个百分点（4%–16%），无过渡期。起算以行使 OTP 之日为准。任何短于 4 年的持有期，此项将主导成本结构 —— 以约 $4.8m 的成交价计，第一年 16% 档约为 $768k，远超本报告中其他所有项目之和。

price_path_risks.title_zh: 正南 151m 的 BUSINESS 2 重工业用地(5.8 公顷,GPR 2.5)
price_path_risks.body_zh: 剖面:房 → 法定公园(20–100m)→ 道路 → Business 2(自 160m 起);396m 西南另有一块 B2。公园是高惯性缓冲,但非永久 —— 改变只需一次 Master Plan 修订,而 URA 确实会宪报修订;GPR 2.5 之下那块地可承载可观体量。今天的风险已部分计价(同街 comps 都带着它),要防的是强度升级:上面今天是什么、作业时段、货车路线,地图回答不了 —— 工作日上班时段与晚 9 点后各实地一次(见 DD-3)。

price_path_risks.title_zh: 学区论点年年重算 —— 失效是不对称下行
price_path_risks.body_zh: Rosyth ~0.80km 是量到校点的保守代理(MOE 量到校地界只会更近,约 200m 余量),「在 1km 内」大概率安全;但 SLA 每年依建筑图则重算 home-school distance,并要求在报名当年重新核实 —— 2026 年的分类不约束 2029 年的报名。学区溢价已在本街价格里:维持 = 不再加分,失效 = 实打实的下行。出价前先在 onemap.gov.sg/school 查邮编 805248 的官方分类(免费,两分钟)。

price_path_risks.title_zh: 在已重估的薄市场里追高
price_path_risks.body_zh: 标的队列中位 land psf 自 2021 年累计约 +41%(2,103 → 2,973,2026 H1),且仍在上行;本街月成交 0–3 笔、caveat 滞后 1–2 个月。若 OCR landed 动量停滞,按当前水平买入即站在周期高位,而 landed 的退出议价期长是常态;SSD 的 4 年硬性最短持有期进一步压缩纠错空间(见成本栈)。对冲:本案不是错价博弈 —— 按近簇出价就是公允,超过近簇才需要理由。
